source.title: Pinduoduo signals interest in developing new logistics system after generating 33% of all parcels in China (KrASIA)

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo generates 33% of all parcels shipped in China, surpassing Taobao/Tmall's share in 2023. With 216.5B industry parcels in 2025, this implies ~71B parcels attributable to PDD's platform.
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo currently generates 33% of packages shipped in China. When Pinduoduo's parcel volume surpassed that of Taobao/Tmall in 2023, Alibaba began repositioning parcel volume as a key performance metric.

verification.verifier_notes: The 33% figure was disclosed around Q1 2025. Applied to 2025's 216.5B industry total yields ~71B parcels. This is an estimate since PDD's exact share may have shifted. PDD does not disclose parcel volume directly.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo holds approximately 27-30% of China's e-commerce GMV, up from near zero in 2016.
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo now holds approximately 27-30% of China's e-commerce GMV — up from near zero in 2016.

verification.verifier_notes: From BusinessTats 2026 statistics. The higher parcel share vs GMV share reflects PDD's lower average order value.

extractions.claim: Duo Duo Station parcel pickup points now account for over 25% of total parcel volume in some agricultural regions.
extractions.evidence: In some agricultural regions, Duoduo Stations now account for over 25% of total parcel volume.

verification.verifier_notes: From Momentum Works / The Low Down reporting on PDD's last-mile infrastructure
